title: Multi-tasking Board Tabs
excerpt: Just like having multiple tabs in your browser, it would be highly convenient to have this multitasking capability within Monday. This way, you can effortlessly switch between tabs or boards in different workspaces, elim…

posts.author: corjlsoftware (Corjl)
posts.cookedHtml: Just like having multiple tabs in your browser, it would be highly convenient to have this multitasking capability within Monday. This way, you can effortlessly switch between tabs or boards in different workspaces, eliminating the need to repeatedly navigate through the drop-down menu to access a different board and then return to the original one.

posts.author: brimfuldrinks (James)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.
We use Monday.com to manage a product database for clients. Our boards contain quite a few columns and I find it frustratingly awkward scrolling back and forth from thye beginning of the board to other columns out of view on the screen. As it stands I find moving through the boards painfully slow.
It would be superhelpful if
a. the scroll bar was easier to use and faster
b. tabbing or similar to move along the columns was activated (like in excel or word)
Thanks

posts.author: meddle01 (John Gray)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes! And multiple tabs in the Monday App. As you mentioned, I keep navigating between multiple workspaces, back and forth, back and forth, etc.

Tabs very much would be a huge help here.

posts.author: MikeB_Axanexa (Mike Buckiewicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There!

Just a trick for quick access, Ctrl-B or Cmd-B will bring up the quick menu to select the recent boards to flip back and forth easily.

If you set up the ecosystem with connected cells, you can also have the links as well.

Hope that helps!

Mike B
Automation Architect
AXANEXA

posts.author: corjlsoftware (Corjl)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @MikeB_Axanexa this is extremely helpful. Thank you so much!
